resourceTemplates.name: canopy-amazon-product
resourceTemplates.title: Canopy Amazon product information
resourceTemplates.description: Get Amazon product information by ASIN, Amazon URL, or GTIN. Domain is optional and defaults to US.

resourceTemplates.name: canopy-amazon-product-variants
resourceTemplates.title: Canopy Amazon product variants
resourceTemplates.description: Get Amazon product variants by ASIN, Amazon URL, or GTIN. Domain is optional and defaults to US.

resourceTemplates.name: canopy-amazon-product-stock
resourceTemplates.title: Canopy Amazon product stock estimates
resourceTemplates.description: Get Amazon product stock estimates by ASIN, Amazon URL, or GTIN. Domain is optional and defaults to US.

resourceTemplates.name: canopy-amazon-product-sales
resourceTemplates.title: Canopy Amazon product sales estimates
resourceTemplates.description: Get Amazon product sales estimates by ASIN, Amazon URL, or GTIN. Domain is optional and defaults to US.

resourceTemplates.name: canopy-amazon-product-reviews
resourceTemplates.title: Canopy Amazon product reviews
resourceTemplates.description: Get top Amazon product reviews by ASIN, Amazon URL, or GTIN. Domain is optional and defaults to US.

resourceTemplates.name: canopy-amazon-product-offers
resourceTemplates.title: Canopy Amazon product offers
resourceTemplates.description: Get Amazon product offers by ASIN, Amazon URL, or GTIN. Domain and page are optional.

resourceTemplates.name: canopy-amazon-search
resourceTemplates.title: Canopy Amazon product search
resourceTemplates.description: Search Amazon products by search term with optional domain, category, paging, price filters, conditions, and sort order.

resourceTemplates.name: canopy-amazon-autocomplete
resourceTemplates.title: Canopy Amazon search autocomplete
resourceTemplates.description: Get Amazon autocomplete suggestions for a search term with optional domain and category alias.

resourceTemplates.name: canopy-amazon-categories-template
resourceTemplates.title: Canopy Amazon category taxonomy
resourceTemplates.description: Get the root Amazon category taxonomy. Domain is optional and defaults to US.

resourceTemplates.name: canopy-amazon-category
resourceTemplates.title: Canopy Amazon category information
resourceTemplates.description: Get Amazon category information and category product results by category ID with optional domain, page, and sort.

resourceTemplates.name: canopy-amazon-seller
resourceTemplates.title: Canopy Amazon seller information
resourceTemplates.description: Get Amazon seller information and seller product results by seller ID with optional domain and page.

resourceTemplates.name: canopy-amazon-author
resourceTemplates.title: Canopy Amazon author information
resourceTemplates.description: Get Amazon author information and book results by author ASIN with optional domain and page.

resourceTemplates.name: canopy-amazon-deals-template
resourceTemplates.title: Canopy Amazon deals
resourceTemplates.description: Get Amazon deals with optional domain, page, limit, and comma-separated category IDs.

resourceTemplates.name: canopy-amazon-bestsellers-template
resourceTemplates.title: Canopy Amazon best sellers
resourceTemplates.description: Get Amazon best sellers with optional domain, page, limit, category ID, or a specific Amazon best-sellers URL.
